suppress.notes: Example project: bdk-multi-instances-example: hazelcast: no fix available
False positive: CVE-2020-29582 was fixed in Kotlin 1.4.21. The NVD CPE entry matches all kotlin 1.x versions; we're on 1.9.25 (transitive from Spring Boot) which is not affected.

handlebars.java 4.5.0 still bundles handlebars-v4.7.7.js as a resource. We use the Java-native handlebars engine (symphony-bdk-template-handlebars), not the JS engine, so the bundled JS file is not executed and these JS-side CVEs are not reachable.
CVE-2026-42582 affects Netty 4.1.134.Final. No fixed release available yet. Tracked for resolution via a dependency upgrade PR.

CVE-2026-41840 through CVE-2026-41851 affect Spring Framework 6.2.18, pulled in via spring-boot-dependencies:3.5.14. No fixed Spring Boot 3.5.x release available yet. Tracked for resolution via a dependency upgrade PR.
